bird.name: Whistling warbler
bird.summary: The whistling warbler (Catharopeza bishopi) is a species of bird in the New World warbler family. It is monotypic within the genus Catharop…

relations.subject: Whistling warbler
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss. This habitat loss is due to volcanic activity and deforestation.{{Cite journal|last1=Andrle|first1=Robert F.|last2=Andrle|first2=Patricia R.|date=1976|title=The Whistling Warbler of St
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
